## Meeting Purpose

[Daily standup to discuss Atlas Sync updates and address team questions/issues.](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New AI Assistant features: contextual window for drafting, improved sidebar with artifact integration](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Image generation templates now stored in artifacts for easier management](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Team encouraged to file tickets for repetitive manual tasks to improve pipeline efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Ongoing improvements to article generation quality and writing style in progress](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

## Topics

### AI Assistant Enhancements

  - [New contextual window for drafting with auto-populated artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Improved sidebar in rich text editor with contextual artifacts and field content](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Ability to add/remove specific artifacts for customized context](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Encouragement to experiment and report any bugs or issues](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)

### Image Generation Updates

  - [Templates for image generation now stored in artifacts instead of input fields](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Example from Monograph client: defined canvas, text placement, and brand elements](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Custom text field available to override auto-generated captions](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Process: Design team creates template based on client specs, then integrated into pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)

### Pipeline Customization

  - [Adventures Group issue: Multiple location artifacts appearing in all pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Workaround: Change artifact type to "rule" to prevent auto-population](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Long-term solution needed for multi-pipeline clients with shared artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)

### External Link Management

  - [Request for centralized system to manage frequently used data point URLs](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Potential solution: Adapt existing knowledge base functionality (used for Biologica and Aimbit)](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Suggestion to file a detailed ticket for further exploration](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Emphasis on identifying repetitive manual tasks for automation](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Encouragement to articulate specific issues and file tickets for pipeline improvements](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Goal: Achieve near-delivery-ready output directly from pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team members to experiment with new AI Assistant features and report any issues](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Tiandra to test changing artifact types for Adventures Group pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Tiandra to file a detailed ticket for external link management system](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [All team members to identify and report repetitive manual tasks for potential automation](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Daniel continuing work on improvements to article generation and assignment creation](https://fathom.video/share/oNDKDbTsMzq8JahtJyoAtbpvrKwgE71s?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
